title: Big Tech's AI ambitions pose a major power test for Europe
summary_full: Japan's SoftBank on Saturday announced plans to build 3.1 GW of AI data centers in the northern Hauts-de-France region by 2031.
summary_public: Japan's SoftBank on Saturday announced plans to build 3.1 GW of AI data centers in the northern Hauts-de-France region by 2031.

FR.label: neutral
